name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC plugin: 20 agents across 6 phases, 13 skills including code quality standards, 9 orchestrator commands. Build products with enforced linting, testing pyramid, SAST/SCA scanning, CI/CD gates, and comprehensive documentation.
highlights: 13 knowledge skills including code quality standards
